rationale: Keep: the citing paper explicitly states it extends prior reservation-price elicitation work “especially BDM-style incentive-compatible methods,” and its empirical design benchmarks ICERANGE against BDM and Vickrey. The cited 2002 paper’s core contribution is introducing and validating BDM for point-of-purchase WTP in marketing, making it a plausible method/foundational source rather than an incidental mention.
